subject: Physical Education
chapter: Yoga as Preventive Measure for Lifestyle Diseases

questions.q: Yoga asanas can help in preventing which of the following lifestyle diseases?
What is the role of Pranayama in preventing lifestyle diseases? (Answer in 50 words)
questions.answer: Pranayama helps in regulating the breathing pattern, which in turn helps in balancing the autonomic nervous system. This helps in preventing lifestyle diseases such as hypertension and diabetes.

questions.q: Explain the concept of 'Yoga as Medicine' in preventing lifestyle diseases. (Answer in 150 words)
questions.answer: Yoga as Medicine is a holistic approach to health and wellness. It combines physical postures, breathing techniques, and meditation to promote physical, mental, and emotional well-being. Yoga can help in preventing lifestyle diseases such as obesity, diabetes, and hypertension by promoting healthy habits and reducing stress levels. It can also help in managing chronic diseases such as arthritis and asthma.

questions.q: Fill in the blank: Regular practice of Yoga can help in _______ the risk of developing lifestyle diseases.
Do yoga practices help in improving mental health? If yes, how? (Answer in 50 words)
questions.answer: Yes, yoga practices help in improving mental health by reducing stress and anxiety levels, promoting relaxation, and improving mood. Yoga also helps in improving sleep quality and reducing symptoms of depression and anxiety.

questions.q: Explain the benefits of Yoga for pregnant women. (Answer in 100 words)
questions.answer: Yoga can help pregnant women in reducing stress and anxiety levels, improving flexibility and balance, and promoting relaxation. It can also help in reducing symptoms of morning sickness and improving sleep quality. Yoga can also help in preparing the body for labor and improving overall well-being.

questions.q: Which of the following yoga asanas is helpful in improving flexibility and balance? (MCQ)
What is the role of meditation in preventing lifestyle diseases? (Answer in 50 words)
questions.answer: Meditation helps in reducing stress and anxiety levels, promoting relaxation, and improving mood. It can also help in improving sleep quality and reducing symptoms of depression and anxiety. Regular meditation practice can help in preventing lifestyle diseases such as hypertension and diabetes.

questions.q: Explain the concept of 'Holistic Approach' in Yoga. (Answer in 100 words)
questions.answer: The concept of 'Holistic Approach' in Yoga refers to a comprehensive approach to health and wellness. It involves the integration of physical, mental, and emotional aspects of an individual to promote overall well-being. A holistic approach to Yoga involves the practice of physical postures, breathing techniques, and meditation to promote physical, mental, and emotional health.

questions.q: True or False: Yoga can help in improving cardiovascular health by reducing blood pressure and improving circulation.
